title: Lead Investment Banker at Care Ratings

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Care Ratings
jsonLd.description:
Care Ratings is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Faridabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Care Ratings:
Care Ratings is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Care Ratings!
